title: ulex europaeus var. strictus
intro: Ulex europaeus var. strictus, a variant of the common gorse plant, is a type of shrub that belongs to the family Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ulex europaeus var. strictus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
